name: Token Vesting Auto-Claim + Reinvest
description: Detect newly vested tokens from major issuers (OP, ARB, ENA, ENS, IMX, BLUR, etc.) and claim them on the agent's behalf. Optionally auto-route claimed tokens into stablecoins or LSTs per agent policy.

supported_chains.name: Ethereum Mainnet — Sablier V2, LlamaPay, ENS lock
Arbitrum One — Sablier V2, custom vesting

use_case: Agent has streams on Sablier V2, an OP airdrop cliff, and ENS-locked tokens. Forgets to claim → tokens continue to lock. This skill checks each block-cliff and auto-claims. Across 5 vestings = ~$2k/month wouldn't have been claimed.

contracts.name: Sablier V2 LockupLinear
contracts.note: Canonical vesting protocol on EVM. Streams[X].withdraw(streamId, amount) claims accrued tokens.

verification.criteria: Tx called known vesting contract claim() with agent as msg.sender. Token balance for that issuer increased post-tx.
